hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // ""'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qiE '(\.bak$|\.old$|_backup\.|web/dist/|node_modules/|\.venv/|__pycache__/|/\.hermes/|\.pyc$)'; then echo "BLOCKED: $FILE_PATH matches protected/dead-code pattern." >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qiE '(/SESSION-[^/]*\.md$|-SUMMARY\.md$|/WHAT-I-DID-|/STATUS-[^/]*\.md$|/DRIFT-[^/]*\.md$|/OPERATOR-QUEUE\.md$|/CLAY-QUEUE\.md$|/findings-summary\.md$|/audits-summary\.md$)'; then echo "BLOCKED: forbidden output pattern (see .claude/rules/output-routing.md)." >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE_PATH" == *.py ]]; then ruff check "$FILE_PATH" --quiet 2>&1 || echo "ruff: $FILE_PATH has issues"; fi
